revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:s calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:s calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] [[Category:qq]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:s calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:s calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:s calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:s calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | nationality | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | nationality = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:s calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for conflicting parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}

Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23460549766|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for conflicting parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with deprecated parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Person infobox header}} {{Uses Infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for conflicting parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} {{tl|Infobox clergy}} may be added by pasting the template as shown below into an article and then filling in the desired fields. Any parameters left blank or omitted will not be displayed. In addition to clergy-specific parameters, this template accepts any parameter that {{tl|Infobox person}} does. See [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. == Usage == Commonly-used parameters: {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size={{{image_size}}}
| alt | caption | native_name | pronunciation | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | death_cause | other_names | citizenship | education | alma_mater | occupation | years_active | religion | spouse | children | parents | relatives | known_for | church | ordained | laicized | writings | congregations | offices_held | title | website | signature={{{signature}}}
| signature_alt | footnotes | module }} {{Infobox clergy | child = | honorific_prefix = | name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | citizenship = | pronunciation = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | burial_place = | death_date = | death_place = | death_cause = | other_names = | years_active = | occupation = | education = | alma_mater = | known_for = | spouse = | partner = | parents = | children = | relatives = | website = | footnotes = | signature = | signature_alt = | nocat_wdimage = | religion = | church = | ordained = | laicised = | writings = | congregations = | offices_held = | title = | module = }} {{clear}} == Embedding other templates == The {{para|module}} parameter may used to embed other templates into this infobox (see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]). == Use as a child template == The '''child''' parameter is used when embedding this infobox into another. {{Infobox person module documentation |template=Infobox clergy |parameter=child}} == Microformats == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox clergy with deprecated parameters}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Religion and belief infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Clergy]] [[Category:Biographical templates usable as a module|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox person|Clergy]] [[Category:Infobox templates with module parameter|Clergy]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
